top_picks.narrative: Overbought on declining volume — a classic combination for a pullback or at minimum a breather. Price has reclaimed its 200-day average — the first hurdle for any recovery. But the 50-day hasn't confirmed yet, so this is early days. RSI is at 74 — momentum is real but getting stretched. A consolidation here would be healthy, not alarming. Volume is thin (0.2x) — take any move with a pinch of salt. Newsflow is mildly positive — 2 items in the last 48 hours — 'Eternal, ICICI Bank & 8 stocks with up to 27% upside. Do you own them?' (ET Markets) is the headline to watch. The tape is chopping sideways with 54% breadth. Stock-picking matters more than market direction here. Banking is lagging the broader tape (score 24) — an extra headwind. Downside risk towards ₹1,373 is real. Capital preservation first. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Bearish → Bearish → Bearish.
